title: Amendment in the additional fee for name to be entered in the register under Chartered Accountants Act, 1949
description: Amendment in the additional fee for name to be entered in the register under Chartered Accountants Act, 1949

Dr. ASHOK HALDIA, Secy. [ADVT111/4/104/2007/Exty.] Note : This notification is issued pursuant to amendment to Chartered Accountants Act, 1949 by the Chartered Accountants (Amendment) Act, 2006 empowering the Council of the Institute to deter- . mine under sub-section (3) of Section 20 of the said Act the additional fee for entry again in the Regis- ter of Members. The consequent amendments to the relevant provisions of the Chartered Accoun- tants Regulations, 1988 are underway. Printed by the Manager, Govt, of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
